active_goal: Improve MemoryOS Lite v3 into a benchmark-usable Letta-style agent memory system for LongMemEval and LoCoMo, without demo-only phase completion, without hiding case-level regressions, and without enabling the v3 kernel by default.
recommended_next_action: Write phase-9 ack.json with ack_level usable and proceed to phase-10 recall work without treating phase-9 as score improvement evidence.

review_summary.phase_binding: All checked phase-9 Markdown artifacts begin with # phase: phase-9, and replay JSON rows include phase-9.
review_summary.behavioral_regression_risk: No retrieval ranking, answer projection or prompting, scoring, v1 fallback, v3 default, or kernel default changes found in the reviewed diagnostic implementation.
review_summary.locomo_case_coverage: Exactly 20 phase-8 LoCoMo failed cases have replay JSON artifacts; conv-26_qa_015 is tracked separately as judge/source-support risk and is not emitted as replay JSON.
review_summary.source_grounding_separation: source_metrics, judge_metrics, and source_hit_semantics keep source/retrieval accounting separate from judged answer quality; source_hit is not treated as retrieval localization.
review_summary.prompt_hack_overfitting_risk: No expected-answer or gold-answer leak found in replay JSON; phase-8 failed-id constants are coverage requirements only, not answer behavior.
review_summary.aggregate_claim_risk: No aggregate score improvement claim found for phase-9.
review_summary.context_bundle_usage: Review read context_bundle.md first; plan and execute artifacts cite the context bundle.
review_summary.stale_artifact_risk: Invalid phase-8 heartbeat retry artifacts are documented as ignored; replay artifacts consume the valid phase8_locomo50 report.

verification_evidence.result: RED failed because 'phase' field was missing
